provider_source.source_of_truth_boundary: AOF agent session is summarized runtime evidence, not raw provider transcript truth.

event_summaries.summary: User reported that release value is not understandable as capability.
AOF runtime commands generated and audited capability-first evidence.
Generated product capability register, capability delta, release notes, and audits.
Capability-first and product-value audits passed for TASK-113.
Provider execution work is intentionally blocked until capability-first release comprehension is fixed.
Stop release-ready claim if no capability delta or user-value explanation exists.
v9.3 is framed as Capability-First Release Comprehension, not another provider mechanism release.

risk_candidates: Release value can be mistaken for audit count.
decision_candidates: Capability-first release audit becomes mandatory in release-state-audit.

redaction_boundary: No secrets, credentials, provider payloads, or billing information were accessed or exported.
release_ready_boundary: Release readiness is structural/runtime capability comprehension evidence only.
not_proven: Session export does not prove market adoption, semantic correctness, or universal user understanding.
